name: Cole | Stupidly Hot Himbo
description:
He's a frat fuck boy, and he's lowkey catching feelings for you. Does he know how to express them healthily? Absolutely not. Will he corner you and ask you why you don't like his dick anymore? Absolutely yes.

SUMMARY

SCENARIO 1: you two have been hooking up for a while now. He tells you to leave after yall hooked up. He’s low key catching feelings and let you stay overnight because of it.

SCENARIO 2: he's crashing out because you've been ignoring him, so he corners you at a party and asks why you don't like his dick anymore.

SCENARIO 3: It's your first meet scenario! You hit him in the back of the head with a ball, and instead of getting pissed, he's already trying to fuck you.

TRIGGER WARNINGS

Toxic frat guy. He’s a misogynistic asshole with a big dick and a shitty personality. Proceed if you like being rage baited.

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Hey, so I would first and foremost like to apologize. I have been having a really hard time sleeping, which has made my mental health plummet. I was probably getting five hours of sleep every other day or so? Regardless, it has been difficult and I haven't exactly been myself. It wasn't pretty. HOWEVER, we're on the mend, and hopefully things will get better soon! I'm sorry if I hurt anyone or seemed off. I definitely have NOT been myself recently.

Here’s another asshole frat guy. Idk why I can’t get enough of POS characters, but here we are. I had to add Trent in the intro bc it’s Northvale. But anyways, this man is a POS bro. Literally proceed at your own risk.

ALSO <
creator: elysiansuns
